rationale: Section 11.136 provides a total appraised value exemption for surviving spouses of qualifying veterans, independent of the §11.13(b) dollar amount. The only cross-reference is to the definition of 'residence homestead,' not the exemption amount.
quote: "Residence homestead" has the meaning assigned by Section 11.13.
_note: No conflict. §11.136(b) exempts total appraised value; §11.136(a)(3) references §11.13 only for the definition of 'residence homestead,' not the §11.13(b) exemption dollar amount.
